TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Anteng, title = Anteng, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Anteng} }

S.FORM: == Anteng == I tiniay i Mutan Siang no Pingtung ko Anteng a niyaro', 208 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 495 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 93% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 462 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 7% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 33 ko tamdaw. O pasinto no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan 87%, 'Amis 2%, Puyuma 1%, roma 3%. Talihafan
S.PHON: == ant…ôŇč == i tiniaj i mo~u~utan siaŇč no~u piŇčto~u~uŇč ko~u ant…ôŇč a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pasinto~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u paiwan **%, °amis *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, ro~uma *%. ta…ĺińßafan
S.FORM: == Anteng == I tiniay i Mutan Siang no Pingtung ko Anteng a niyaro', 208 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 495 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 93% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 462 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 7% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 33 ko tamdaw. O pasinto no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan 87%, 'Amis 2%, Puyuma 1%, roma 3%. Talihafan
